---
title: ""
about: 
  id: intro-heading
  template: jolla
  image-width: 20em
  image-shape: round
  image: images/montana_picture.jpg
  links: 
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:hoover7@stolaf.edu
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/ghoover24
---


:::{#intro-heading}
## Gaby Hoover
**St. Olaf College**

she/her/hers

### Personal


### Contact Information

**Email:** <a href='mailto:hoover7@stolaf.edu'>hoover7@stolaf.edu</a>
